name: azadirachta indica
title: azadirachta indica benefits
description: Azadirachta indica repels mosquitoes by emitting a strong, unpleasant odor that deters these insects from approaching, thus preventing bites and the potential transmission of diseases. This benefit is crucial, as mosquito bites can cause discomfort, transmit diseases such as malaria and dengue fever, and even trigger severe allergic reactions in some individuals. The plant's repelling properties are attributed to its bioactive constituents, including limonoids, particularly azadirachti...
